productDisplayName: Nike Men Running Navy Blue Shorts
description: Composition Navy blue running shorts for men made of 86% polyester, 14% spandex and Dri-Fit fabric, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring, mesh panelling on the sides in a florescent green, zipped pocket at the back, vented hem and swoosh logo in a reflective material towards the left hemline Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Line dry Built with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike running shorts comes in a simple design. Team it with tees and running shoes.
